  "active_set": ["R1.2", "R1.3", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "Should the review focus primarily on (A) sentence-level writing polish and clarity, (B) technical argumentation and evidence–claim consistency within this section, or (C) both equally?",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "A review may need to verify the internal logic of the scaling claims and their stated mechanisms across strategies and fleet sizes.",
    "R1.3": "A review may need to check that each stated pattern is supported by the described experimental setup and observations as written.",
    "R1.6": "A review may need to improve sentence-level clarity, grammar, and concision to strengthen readability of this results narrative.",
    "RX.1": "The review should explicitly note uncertainties and limits given only a brief text without figures or full experimental details.",
    "RX.2": "The review should guard against endorsing overgeneralizations beyond what the section reports.",
    "RX.3": "The review should remain scoped to evaluating this specific section rather than proposing new analyses or experiments.",
    "RX.4": "The review should avoid language that could enable misinterpretation or harmful operational claims from limited evidence.",
    "RX.5": "The review should tie feedback to specific sentences or claims to maintain clear provenance and traceability."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: Should the review focus primarily on (A) sentence-level writing polish and clarity, (B) technical argumentation and evidence–claim consistency within this section, or (C) both equally?

rationale.R1.2: A review may need to verify the internal logic of the scaling claims and their stated mechanisms across strategies and fleet sizes.
rationale.R1.3: A review may need to check that each stated pattern is supported by the described experimental setup and observations as written.
rationale.R1.6: A review may need to improve sentence-level clarity, grammar, and concision to strengthen readability of this results narrative.
rationale.RX.1: The review should explicitly note uncertainties and limits given only a brief text without figures or full experimental details.
rationale.RX.2: The review should guard against endorsing overgeneralizations beyond what the section reports.
rationale.RX.3: The review should remain scoped to evaluating this specific section rather than proposing new analyses or experiments.
rationale.RX.4: The review should avoid language that could enable misinterpretation or harmful operational claims from limited evidence.
rationale.RX.5: The review should tie feedback to specific sentences or claims to maintain clear provenance and traceability.
